summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kara Immobilier Service bilingual website. All backend APIs working perfectly including bilingual chatbot. Frontend features tested: language switcher (FR/EN), services section with 'Mise en Location' first, 2+ years experience stats, privacy/terms pages, contact form integration, and AI chatbot with language switching.
passed_tests: AI Chatbot French API (POST /api/chat) - French response working with language parameter
AI Chatbot English API (POST /api/chat) - English response working with language parameter
AI Chatbot session continuity - maintained across requests
Contact form validation API - proper 422 error for invalid data
Language switcher functionality - FR/EN toggle working correctly
Text content translation - all content changes with language switch
Services section - 'Mise en Location/Property Listing' appears first
Experience stats - shows '2+' years instead of 15
Privacy policy page (/privacy) - loads correctly with proper content
Terms of use page (/terms) - loads correctly with proper content
Contact form frontend integration - successful form submission and API integration
AI Chatbot UI - opens, sends messages, receives bilingual responses
Footer legal links - properly navigate to /privacy and /terms pages
Language persistence - localStorage correctly stores language preference
